reasoning: The key limiter is the 9.3% decline from 5-min to 20-min power, indicating poor lactate clearance and aerobic base. Your last ride on the Ocean Lava Cliffside Loop showed a moderate TSS, which aligns with a recovering status and readiness for intensity. Focusing on efforts like the main climb in the Alpine Loop, developing fatigue resistance with focused over-unders will prepare you for the extended climb demands.

suggested_sets.name: Main Set
suggested_sets.description: 3 x 15 min over-unders at 218W for 4 min, then 8 min at 245W, repeat with 3 min rest between sets

weekly_focus: This week: controlled return — rebuild aerobic base before pushing threshold again.
